title: NG14 5HJ, Sarval Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/CP3025SZ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Sarval Limited   Installation name: Sarval Limited   Permit number: EPR/CP3025SZ/A001   "
